ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_cases" (
  "epi_date" TEXT /* The date of the epidemiological report */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* The number of new cases reported on this date */,
  "7_day_avg" INTEGER /* The 7-day average of cases */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* The cumulative number of cases up to this date */,
  "report_asof" TEXT /* The timestamp or date when the data was reported to the CDC */,
  "cumulative_sum" INTEGER /* The cumulative sum of cases up to this date */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region where the cases are reported */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the city where the cases are reported */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the county where the cases are reported */,
  "cases_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the last 7 days */,
  "cases_last_30_days" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the last 30 days */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the reported cases */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate for the reported cases */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epi_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported case */,
  "epi_date" TEXT /* The date of the epidemiological report */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the disease */,
  "reporting_site_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the reporting site */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of recovery */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment details for the patient */,
  "isolation_status" TEXT /* Isolation status of the patient */,
  "contact_tracing" TEXT /* Contact tracing details */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_epi_date FOREIGN KEY ("epi_date") REFERENCES daily_cases ("epi_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_reporting_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_site_id") REFERENCES reporting_sites ("reporting_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "is_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the infectious disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Incubation period of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission of the disease */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the disease */,
  "prognosis" TEXT /* Prognosis for the disease */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Treatment options available for the disease */,
  "prevention_measures" TEXT /* Prevention measures for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_sites" (
  "reporting_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the reporting site (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the reporting site */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the site is currently active */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_system_role" INTEGER /* Whether the role is a system-defined role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user's role */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the user's current session */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a staff member */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Whether the user has superuser privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "epi_date" TEXT /* The date of the epidemiological report accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., case data, model data) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the access was not successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_epi_date FOREIGN KEY ("epi_date") REFERENCES daily_cases ("epi_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the epidemiological model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the model */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Source code of the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the model is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the forecasting model used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* The date for which the forecast was made */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* The predicted number of cases */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_interval" TEXT /* Interval for the forecast (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the forecast is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)
